ogTitle: Terrey Hills vs Terrigal: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Terrey Hills and Terrigal.
heading: Terrey Hills vs Terrigal — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Terrey Hills, New South Wales and Terrigal, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Terrey Hills and Terrigal have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Terrey Hills or Terrigal safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Terrey Hills has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Terrigal scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Terrey Hills scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Terrigal scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Terrey Hills or Terrigal?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Terrey Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
